title: Lower Back Restoration Protocol
description: A targeted 8-week program focusing on correcting lower back dysfunction through gait correction, hip mobility, and core integration using the FP Big 4 framework.

exercises.name: Standing Decompression
exercises.description: Spinal decompression through proper stacking and breathing
exercises.notes: Hold 60 seconds each set. Focus on crown-of-head pull.

exercises.name: Hip Shift Correction
exercises.description: Corrects lateral hip imbalance in standing and walking
exercises.notes: Slow and controlled. Feel the weight shift through the foot.

exercises.name: Pelvic Tilt Correction
exercises.description: Addresses anterior pelvic tilt through glute and core activation
exercises.notes: Breathe out on the tilt. Don't over-tuck.

exercises.name: Myofascial Ball Release
exercises.description: Tennis ball release for QL and erector spinae
exercises.notes: 90 seconds each side. Find the tender spots.

title: Posture & Neck Pain Recovery
description: A 12-week intensive program for correcting forward head posture, thoracic kyphosis, and associated neck pain through FP methodologies.

exercises.name: Thoracic Rotation
exercises.description: Mobilize the thoracic spine through controlled rotation
exercises.notes: 10 reps each side. Keep hips facing forward.

exercises.name: Standing Decompression
exercises.notes: Focus on neck lengthening. Chin slightly tucked.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Throwing Pattern
exercises.description: Integrate upper body through contralateral movement
exercises.notes: Light resistance. Focus on rotation quality.

exercises.name: Gait Arm Swing Drill
exercises.description: Correct arm swing pattern for better upper body mechanics
exercises.notes: Exaggerate the swing. Feel the cross-body connection.
